parsed_output.justification: Based on the claims, Paul was the Seer, Mitchell was the Robber, and Mike was the Troublemaker. If Mitchell (Robber) robbed Justin (the implied Werewolf), Mitchell became the Werewolf. Mike (Troublemaker) then switched Justin (now the Robber) with Paul (the Seer), meaning Mitchell remained the Werewolf while Justin and Paul swapped roles. Mike explicitly explains this logic in the transcript to point the vote toward Mitchell.
